text.title: AI Design Assistant Patterns (UX/UI) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-design-assistant-patterns. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Assistant fires on every node selection; spams comments.
Privacy complaint: assistant reads analytics without telling users.
Assistant silently breaks offline; users assume it works.
Auditor asks who signed off; no human checkpoint.
antipattern.fix: Add ≥1 human checkpoint per workflow stage.
